rows.label: qev018701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yoohoo! Welcome-welcome! Bronze member, are you
utilizing the Shining Erudition Hall, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you exchange Miranium for cash, both Mee-mee and
you will have lots of money and be happy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0003
rows.name:
You love money too, right?
Then please use it more and more, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018701_SEL0011
rows.name:
Declare that money is more important
than life.

rows.label: qev018701_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you don't have that much
attachment to money.

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0004
rows.name:
As expected of an Earthling! You're as much of a slave
to money as a Nopon, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's right! Won't you bring some Aurora Stone and
become a Silver member, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0006
rows.name: Eh! I thought all Earthlings and Nopon loved money, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0007
rows.name:
But, but, without money, you BLADEs can't prepare your
equipment, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0008
rows.name:
You can't live on pretty ideals alone! I have a delicious
story for you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Listen, won't you bring some Aurora Stone and become a
Silver member, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you do that, the exchange rate goes up and up, and
you can make even bigger profits than now, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0011
rows.name: Nice! I'm very happy, mo! Do your best to get it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0012
rows.name:
With that Aurora Stone, Mee-mee will add another
Super Alchemy Mech...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0013
rows.name: And I'll get even more money than I do now, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0014
rows.name:
Frontier Net is expanding, and more and more Miranium
is gathering in NLA, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0015
rows.name:
There's no way I'm missing this business opportunity, mo!
With the Aurora Stone, I'll add another Super Alchemy
Mech, "Miranium Change"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0016
rows.name: And I'll get even more money than I do now, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Welcome-welcome! Bronze member! Welcome to the
Shining Erudition Hall, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0018
rows.name:
How is it? Did you get the Aurora Stone?
Let's get money together, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0019
rows.name:
This is it! With this, I can increase the number of
Super Alchemy Mechs by one more, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you! From today, you are a Silver member, and
the exchange rate is very very up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0021
rows.name:
Keep exchanging lots of Miranium to liven up the
Shining Erudition Hall and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0022
rows.name: Please make Mee-mee the richest person in NLA, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018701_SEL0031
rows.name: Laugh and agree to make a profit together.

rows.label: qev018701_JNK0040
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018701_SEL0041
rows.name:
State firmly that you have no intention
of contributing.

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0023
rows.name: Yay! Let's save up tons of savings! Money is the best, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0024
rows.name:
Now then, time is money!
Shall I start developing the Alchemy Mech, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0025
rows.name: Oh my... that's a little sad, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018701_MSG0026
rows.name:
Mee-mee prays for her member's happiness, mo.
Exchange Miranium whenever you feel like it, mo![ST:wait ]
